error_signature: you have reached the maximum of live webhook endpoints
title: Maximum live webhook endpoints reached in Stripe
symptom: When trying to activate workflows with webhooks, n8n displays 'you have reached the maximum of live webhook endpoints'. This prevents the user from using the workflows.
applies_when: Have multiple workflows with unique endpoints
not_this_if: Using a different service with different webhook limits
root_cause: Stripe imposes a limit of 16 live webhook endpoints per account. Even if some endpoints are disabled, they still count towards this limit, causing errors when trying to activate new workflows.
fix_steps: Log in to your Stripe dashboard
Review the list of registered endpoints
Delete any unnecessary endpoints to free up space
agent_instruction: Check and manage your Stripe webhook endpoints to resolve the limit issue.
